notes: Visual acceptance used the live local API backed by the published immutable snapshot, not test-scenario fixtures.
Clockwise motion was not required or forced; the rendered real tails include reversals, stalls, and different directions.
This artifact is local visual acceptance, not production monitoring evidence.
The regenerated snapshot retains the same governed taxonomy/model/profile contract; current screenshots cover the progressive UX on its live local API route.
